subject: Project update
snippet: Hey Jen, just wanted to give you a quick heads up on the Hartwell project — we h...
body: Hey Jen, just wanted to give you a quick heads up on the Hartwell project — we hit a snag with the vendor contracts but should be back on track by Friday. Nothing major, just wanted you in the loop since you asked last week.

subject: Re: Project update
snippet: Thanks for the update! Glad it's nothing major. Let me know if you need me to ma...
body: Thanks for the update! Glad it's nothing major. Let me know if you need me to make any calls on the vendor side, I still have Marcus's number from the last round.

subject: Team meeting Thursday
snippet: Can you send me the agenda items you want covered Thursday? I've got budget revi...
body: Can you send me the agenda items you want covered Thursday? I've got budget review and the new hire intros so far.

subject: Re: Team meeting Thursday
snippet: Add the Q3 timeline slip discussion too — I think we need to address it before i...
body: Add the Q3 timeline slip discussion too — I think we need to address it before it becomes a bigger issue. Should only take 10 minutes.

subject: Re: Team meeting Thursday
snippet: Good call, adding it now. I'll send the final agenda out tonight so everyone has...
body: Good call, adding it now. I'll send the final agenda out tonight so everyone has time to prep.

subject: Manager 1:1 prep
snippet: My 1:1 with my manager is tomorrow and I'm blanking on how to frame the promotio...
body: My 1:1 with my manager is tomorrow and I'm blanking on how to frame the promotion conversation. Any tips from when you did yours?

subject: Re: Manager 1:1 prep
snippet: Lead with impact, not effort — have 2-3 concrete wins ready with numbers if you ...
body: Lead with impact, not effort — have 2-3 concrete wins ready with numbers if you can. Then ask directly what's needed to get to the next level instead of hinting.

subject: Re: Manager 1:1 prep
snippet: That's helpful. I've got the client retention numbers and the process doc I wrot...
body: That's helpful. I've got the client retention numbers and the process doc I wrote. Should I bring both up or just pick one?

subject: Re: Manager 1:1 prep
snippet: Bring both but lead with retention since it's revenue-tied, that always lands be...
body: Bring both but lead with retention since it's revenue-tied, that always lands better with managers. Good luck tomorrow, you've got this.

subject: Training reminder
snippet: Did you get the email about the mandatory compliance training? Mine says due by ...
body: Did you get the email about the mandatory compliance training? Mine says due by end of month and I haven't even started it.

subject: Re: Training reminder
snippet: Yes, same deadline on mine. I did the first two modules last night, they're only...
body: Yes, same deadline on mine. I did the first two modules last night, they're only about 15 minutes each so not too bad.

subject: Re: Training reminder
snippet: Okay good to know. Is it the same platform as last year or did they switch again...
body: Okay good to know. Is it the same platform as last year or did they switch again?

subject: Re: Training reminder
snippet: Same platform thankfully, so your old login should still work. Just make sure yo...
body: Same platform thankfully, so your old login should still work. Just make sure you finish the quiz at the end of each module or it doesn't save progress.

subject: Re: Training reminder
snippet: Got it, thanks. Blocking off an hour this weekend to just knock it all out at on...
body: Got it, thanks. Blocking off an hour this weekend to just knock it all out at once.

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: Hey! Been way too long since we grabbed lunch. You free Wednesday or Thursday? T...
body: Hey! Been way too long since we grabbed lunch. You free Wednesday or Thursday? That new ramen place opened up near the office.

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Thursday works better for me. I've heard good things about that place, been want...
body: Thursday works better for me. I've heard good things about that place, been wanting to try it. Noon?

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Want to catch up over coffee next Tuesday morning before the standup madness beg...
body: Want to catch up over coffee next Tuesday morning before the standup madness begins? Feels like we haven't talked outside of Slack in weeks.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Yes please, I need it. 8am at the usual spot on Fifth? I'll bring my questions a...
body: Yes please, I need it. 8am at the usual spot on Fifth? I'll bring my questions about your trip too.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: 8am works. And yes I have so many photos to show you, it was incredible. See you...
body: 8am works. And yes I have so many photos to show you, it was incredible. See you then.

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Okay it's officially birthday planning time. I'm thinking brunch Saturday, that ...
body: Okay it's officially birthday planning time. I'm thinking brunch Saturday, that place with the bottomless mimosas we always talk about but never actually go to.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Finally making it happen! I'm in. Should we invite the rest of the group or keep...
body: Finally making it happen! I'm in. Should we invite the rest of the group or keep it small this year?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Let's keep it small, just you, me, and maybe Priya. Big groups make it hard to a...
body: Let's keep it small, just you, me, and maybe Priya. Big groups make it hard to actually talk. I'll make the reservation for 11am.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Perfect, that sounds so much better honestly. I'll bring your gift then, I alrea...
body: Perfect, that sounds so much better honestly. I'll bring your gift then, I already found something I think you'll love.

subject: Renewal options
snippet: My car insurance renewal notice came in and the rate jumped almost 20%. Have you...
body: My car insurance renewal notice came in and the rate jumped almost 20%. Have you looked at switching providers recently or is everyone raising rates right now?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Mine went up too, about 15%. I got a couple quotes last month, one company came ...
body: Mine went up too, about 15%. I got a couple quotes last month, one company came in noticeably lower for similar coverage. Want me to send you the comparison sheet I made?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Yes please, that would save me so much time. Did switching cause any issues with...
body: Yes please, that would save me so much time. Did switching cause any issues with your existing policy or a lapse in coverage?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: No issues at all, they coordinated the start date so there was zero gap. Just ma...
body: No issues at all, they coordinated the start date so there was zero gap. Just make sure you cancel the old one only after the new one is confirmed active.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Good tip, thank you. Sending my current policy details over so I can get quotes ...
body: Good tip, thank you. Sending my current policy details over so I can get quotes from the same company you used.

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Quick question, did you authorize an extra charge from the office supply vendor ...
body: Quick question, did you authorize an extra charge from the office supply vendor this month? The invoice is higher than usual and I don't recognize one of the line items.

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: I didn't authorize anything extra on my end. Can you forward me the invoice? Mig...
body: I didn't authorize anything extra on my end. Can you forward me the invoice? Might be the rush shipping fee from that order we placed last minute, but let's double check before paying it.

subject: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: My landlord sent the renewal offer, rent's going up $150 a month. Trying to deci...
body: My landlord sent the renewal offer, rent's going up $150 a month. Trying to decide if I should just sign or try to negotiate or look elsewhere. What did you do last time?

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: I negotiated mine down by pointing out a couple of comparable listings nearby th...
body: I negotiated mine down by pointing out a couple of comparable listings nearby that were cheaper. Landlords usually don't want the hassle of finding a new tenant, so it's worth at least asking.

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: That makes sense. I'll pull a few listings this weekend and send a counteroffer....
body: That makes sense. I'll pull a few listings this weekend and send a counteroffer. Fingers crossed they're reasonable about it.

subject: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Sending you the good stuff from my newsletter roundup this week — there's a grea...
body: Sending you the good stuff from my newsletter roundup this week — there's a great piece on remote work burnout and another on that new sourdough method everyone's obsessed with.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Ooh the burnout one sounds relevant to literally everyone I know right now. Send...
body: Ooh the burnout one sounds relevant to literally everyone I know right now. Send the links whenever, I'll read them on my train commute tomorrow.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Here they are. Also there was a short one about how everyone's cutting back on s...
body: Here they are. Also there was a short one about how everyone's cutting back on social media that made me think of your digital detox attempt last spring.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Ha, don't remind me, I lasted like four days. Thanks for sending these over, thi...
body: Ha, don't remind me, I lasted like four days. Thanks for sending these over, this is exactly the kind of thing I never find time to search for myself.

subject: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Can you grab the kids from school Wednesday? I've got a late meeting that got mo...
body: Can you grab the kids from school Wednesday? I've got a late meeting that got moved and won't make it in time.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Yes I can do Wednesday, no problem. What time does pickup start again, is it sti...
body: Yes I can do Wednesday, no problem. What time does pickup start again, is it still 3:15?

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Yes, 3:15, and Mia's teacher said to grab her from the side door by the gym this...
body: Yes, 3:15, and Mia's teacher said to grab her from the side door by the gym this week since they're doing construction near the main entrance.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Good to know, thanks for the heads up. Should I take them back to your place or ...
body: Good to know, thanks for the heads up. Should I take them back to your place or mine until you're done?

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Your place is easier since it's closer to my office. I should be done by 6 to co...
body: Your place is easier since it's closer to my office. I should be done by 6 to come grab them. Thank you so much for this, you're a lifesaver.

subject: Family vacation planning
snippet: Okay, are we still thinking the lake house for the family trip in August? I need...
body: Okay, are we still thinking the lake house for the family trip in August? I need to start looking at flights soon if so.

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: Yes let's lock it in, the lake house was such a hit last year. I'll check with m...
body: Yes let's lock it in, the lake house was such a hit last year. I'll check with mom and dad on which week works best for them and get back to you by Friday.

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: Any plans this weekend? Was thinking of driving down if you're around, could bri...
body: Any plans this weekend? Was thinking of driving down if you're around, could bring the kids and make a day of it.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: I'm around Saturday, nothing major planned. Come on down, we can do the farmers ...
body: I'm around Saturday, nothing major planned. Come on down, we can do the farmers market in the morning if the weather holds up.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Perfect, the kids will love that. We'll head out early and should be there by 9....
body: Perfect, the kids will love that. We'll head out early and should be there by 9. Can't wait to see you.

body: Jen! Booking the cheap Airbnb near me for the 12th. Bring the new zine, I want to read the Warwick poem. Love you.
